scripts.build: cd frontend && rm -f package-lock.json && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function cp(a,b){if(!fs.existsSync(b))fs.mkdirSync(b,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(a).forEach(c=>{const d=path.join(a,c),e=path.join(b,c);fs.statSync(d).isDirectory()?cp(d,e):fs.copyFileSync(d,e)})}cp('frontend/dist','backend/public');console.log('Build complete!')"
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && node server.js
